prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: He Knows I Bake at Midnight
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: emotionally charged casserole exchange
Props: scarf with impossible timing, unopened letter, ceramic owl

Cast:
- Derek Vale | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.33 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Wyatt Pruitt | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=attorney with no visible clients | threat_aura=0.63 | space=old family office described as just storage | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Rachel Sutton | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.34 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Cole Vale | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.83 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased; knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Mara Sutton | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=financial advisor | threat_aura=0.36 | space=annex room described as retreat supplies | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Daniel Hawthorne | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.36 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Claire Hawthorne | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Brooke Bennett | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Wyatt Pruitt is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Derek Vale says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Wyatt?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Claire. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Derek. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Cole."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
